reasoning: Your main limiter is lactate clearance and fatigue resistance. The last ride indicates moderate effort at 64% FTP but we need to push your capacity to clear lactate efficiently. Tackling this with over-unders will prepare you for high-intensity efforts like on the Alpine Loop climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4 x (5min at 242-256W, followed by 5min at 201-218W). Focus on sustaining power through lactate buildup and recovery.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
